creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 230268
finance/ticker: update to 4.4.3

- Added groups.  Watchlists and holdings can be grouped in .ticker.yml
   under the groups property.  While running ticker, press TAB to cycle
   forward through groups.

Changelog:	https://github.com/achannarasappa/ticker/releases/tag/v4.4.0
Changelog:	https://github.com/achannarasappa/ticker/releases/tag/v4.4.1
Changelog:	https://github.com/achannarasappa/ticker/releases/tag/v4.4.2
Changelog:	https://github.com/achannarasappa/ticker/releases/tag/v4.4.3

Tested on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
Testsuite passed on both architectures.
Do not MFH as this is a feature release.
